title: How do I make a Team Colum vs People Colum
excerpt: How do a make a colum speifically for Teams? I know I can add teams to people colums but I want a colum specificaly for teams as shown in the pic.

posts.author: Ben.felt (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml: How do a make a colum speifically for Teams? I know I can add teams to people colums but I want a colum specificaly for teams as shown in the pic.

posts.author: jhamiter (Johnathan Hamiter)
posts.cookedHtml: Seconded on this, would be great to be able to restrict a Person column to either People or Teams. Could just be an option in the column settings, where you can restrict to 1,2,3 people.

posts.author: mmerchat (Monica Merchat)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree and would upvote if the upvote button was present…
